case_title: CODY ALAN ZOPPA VS. HOWARD LEE

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,391.00 FILED BY LEE, HOWARD AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ZOPPA, CODY ALAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 95.00 SERVED JUL-10-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ZOPPA, CODY ALAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-29-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-29-2018 BY VISITING JUDGE ANNE WONG. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED - RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, HOWARD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-29-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-29-2018 BY VISITING JUDGE ANNE WONG. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZOPPA, CODY ALAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEE, HOWARD RENTAL AGREEMENT SPECIFIES EARLY TERMINATION FEE AND $450 CLEANING FEE IS REASONABLE, PET FEE OF $150 IS REASONABLE. RENT BOARD FEE MAY BE OFFSET BY INTEREST OWED ON SECURITY DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
